name: Chat Bubbles
description: Telegram-style chat experience for Mattermost: bubbles, replies, forward, pinned bar, date chip, scroll button, favicon unread badge and more (web/desktop).

settings_schema.header: Chat Bubbles settings — Telegram-style chat experience
settings_schema.footer: After changing settings, users must refresh their Mattermost page.

settings.help_text: Enable or disable the entire bubble chat mode.

settings.display_name: Only in DMs and group messages
settings.help_text: When enabled, bubbles are shown only in direct and group messages, not in channels.
Bubble color for your own messages. auto = follow the theme; or a hex color like #effdde.
Bubble color for received messages. auto = follow the theme.
Text color inside bubbles. auto = follow the theme.
Maximum bubble width as a percentage (30 to 95).
Hide the avatar on your own messages (like Telegram).
Reply with a non-editable preview bar above the message box, like Telegram.
Show the send time in the bottom corner of the bubble next to the read ticks (like Telegram).
Show the latest pinned message in a bar at the top of the chat; click to jump to it, or unpin with the × button.
Show a floating date label while scrolling (Today / Yesterday / date).
Round scroll-to-bottom button with a new-message counter.
Double-clicking any message opens the Telegram-style reply (without opening the thread panel).
Forward button in the message hover menu + destination chat picker + a 'Forwarded from' header.
Small tail on the bottom corner of bubbles, like Telegram.
Subtle sound when sending and receiving messages in the open chat (like Telegram).
Font size of message text in pixels (10 to 28). 0 = theme default. For example 16 or 18 for larger, Telegram-like text.
Show the total unread-message count as a red circle on the browser tab icon (like Telegram Web). Muted channels only contribute their mentions.
